items.name: Amira Hassan
items.text: Dr. Zahir and his team provided exceptional care during my root canal. I was terrified, but their compassion made all the difference. The facility is modern and spotlessly clean.

items.name: Ibrahim Osman
items.text: I've been coming to Zylo for three years now. The professionalism and attention to detail is unmatched. My teeth have never looked better, and I feel confident in my smile again.

items.name: Leila Mohamed
items.text: As a medical professional myself, I appreciate the evidence-based approach Zylo takes to dental care. They explain everything clearly and never rush treatment.

items.name: Karim Abdurahman
items.text: Got my braces adjusted today and the experience was painless. The staff is friendly and the environment is comfortable. Highly recommend!

items.name: Fatima Ali
items.text: My family has been patients here for over 5 years. The consistent quality and genuine care they show for their patients is remarkable. Thank you, Zylo!

value.title: Patient Stories from Juba
value.description: Real experiences from families who trust Zylo for their clinical excellence and gentle care.
